dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S5029 IS: Educators for America Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Kelly introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions

form.official-title: To amend the requirements for teaching residency programs under part A of title II of the Higher Education Act of 1965.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Educators for America Act.
Section 202(e)(2)(B)(ii) of the Higher Education Act of 1965 (20 U.S.C. 1022a(e)(2)(B)(ii)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by redesignating subclauses (I), (II), and (III) as items (aa), (bb), and (cc), respectively, and adjusting the margins accordingly;
in the matter preceding item (aa), as so redesignated, by striking shall and all that follows through characteristics: and inserting the following: “shall carry out the following:

subclause.text: Establish criteria for the selection of eligible individuals to participate in the teaching residency program based on the following characteristics:

paragraph.text: by adding at the end the following:

subclause.text: Prioritize the recruitment and selection of eligible individuals underrepresented in the teaching profession, including men.
